parameters.columns: order_id, customer_phone, product_type, plan_gb, data_used, data_remaining, status, created_at, fulfilled_at
parameters.conditions: customer_phone = '{{$json.from}}' AND status IN ('paid', 'fulfilled') ORDER BY created_at DESC LIMIT 1

messages.content:
You are a refund intent classifier. Analyze the customer's message and classify their refund request.

Possible intents:
- refund_request_full: Customer wants a full refund for their order
- refund_request_partial: Customer used some data, wants refund for unused portion (e.g., "I only used 3GB of 5GB, refund the rest")
- refund_policy_question: Customer is asking about the refund policy
- refund_not_eligible: Customer asking for refund but not eligible (e.g., Residential data carries over, no partial refund)
- not_refund_related: Message is not about refunds

Response format (JSON only):
{"intent": "...", "reason": "...", "eligible": true/false, "message": "brief customer message"}

parameters.message:
✅ REFUND PROCESSED

Your refund has been initiated:
💰 Amount: ₦{{$json.amount}}
📋 Order ID: {{$json.orderId}}
⏰ Processing time: 1-5 business days

The refund will be credited to your original payment method.

If you have any questions, reply help 🙏

📋 REFUND POLICY

{{$json.message}}

If your proxy has stopped working or you have another issue,
let me know and I'll help.

I can help with refunds! Here's how it works:

📋 REFUND POLICY:
• Before delivery → full refund
• Dead proxy within 24h → free replacement or refund
• Provider outage → automatic refund

❌ What's NOT refundable:
• Residential data (carries over, never expires)
• Partial Mobile data (window expires, not GB)
• ISP/Datacenter after delivery

Want to request a refund? Reply with your order ID or tell me what's wrong.
